biology.name: Biological Circuits
biology.description: Biochemical pathways, cellular feedback networks, and systems biology mechanisms governing human physiology.

lifestyle.name: Lifestyle Practices
lifestyle.description: Physiological protocols, daily behaviors, and longevity habits (sleep, exercise, thermal exposure) targeting physical health.

book.name: Finds & Book Reviews
book.description: Syntheses of peer-reviewed books, longevity literature, and consensus clinical guides.

longevity.name: Healthspan & Lifespan
longevity.description: Scientific research, metrics, and protocols aimed at extending human healthspan and cellular vitality.

metabolism.name: Metabolic Regulation
metabolism.description: Biochemical pathways regulating glucose balance, cellular energy sensor kinase cascades, and insulin sensitivity.

circadian.name: Circadian Biology
circadian.description: The endogenous 24-hour clocks governing hormone scheduling, sleep-wake cycles, and peripheral organ timing.

sleep.name: Sleep Architecture
sleep.description: Neurological and homeostatic sleep pressure pathways governing deep and REM sleep recovery cycles.

exercise.name: Exercise Physiology
exercise.description: Cardiorespiratory adaptations, Zone 2 mitochondrial biogenesis, and strength protocols.

fasting.name: Periodic Fasting
fasting.description: Nutritional stress protocols that downregulate insulin, upregulate AMPK, and trigger cellular cleanup.

mitochondria.name: Mitochondrial Health
mitochondria.description: Cellular powerhouses regulating fat oxidation, respiration capacity, and oxidative stress pathways.

supplements.name: Biomolecule Support
supplements.description: Oral cofactors and precursors under investigation for boosting biochemical pathway inputs.

fgf21.name: FGF21 Signaling
fgf21.description: Fibroblast Growth Factor 21; liver-secreted starvation hormone mediating benefits of protein restriction.
